{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":653259,"duration_api_ms":535599,"num_turns":78,"result":"Phase 3 완료. AC 통과 + 커밋 완료.

**구현 요약:**
- `webhard-api/src/companies/dto/folder-alias.dto.ts` 신규 — `ListFolderAliasesDto`, `ApproveFolderAliasDto`
- `webhard-api/src/companies/folder-alias.service.ts` 신규 — `list/approve/reject/delete` + `cascadeBackfill` 단일 트랜잭션, 멱등 approve
- `webhard-api/src/companies/companies.controller.ts` — admin 전용 endpoint 4개 추가 (`AdminGuard`, `req.user.userId` → `approvedBy` 매핑)
- `webhard-api/src/companies/companies.module.ts` — `ContactsModule` 의존 + `FolderAliasService` provider/export 추가
- `webhard-api/src/companies/folder-alias.service.spec.ts` 신규 — B1~B8 + 비존재 id 케이스 (총 11 tests, 전부 통과)
- `docs/specs/api/nestjs-endpoints.md` — 신규 endpoint 4개 등록

**AC 결과:**
- `pnpm build` ✓ 통과
- `pnpm test` ✓ 39 suites / 672 tests 모두 통과 (folder-alias.service.spec 11/11)
